task_description: End-to-end validation, documentation polish, and project completion for the Sleep Audio Pipeline CDK project. This is the final development issue bringing the project to a clean, well-documented, ready-for-deployment state.

verification.summary: All 298 tests pass (182 original + 116 new). CDK synth succeeds for dev, stage, and prod environments. Test quality review found minor deduplication opportunities but no substantive issues. 100% code coverage on cdk_base/.
